title: Diff Comment Threads with Nested Replies

findings.description: No inline comment or threaded reply functionality found in the diff view. The diff shows a flat file list with Mark reviewed buttons per file, but no ability to add comments on specific diff lines or create threaded discussions.
findings.expected: Ability to add inline comments on diff lines with nested/threaded replies
findings.actual: Only file-level Mark reviewed buttons present; no inline commenting system
